title: Senior Data Analyst (m/f/d)
description: Were looking for a curious and hands-on Senior Data Analyst to help turn complex operational and sensor data into meaningful insights that drive smarter decisions across the business. In this role, youll work with large-scale time-series and event-driven datasets, building scalable analytics solutions, automations, and dashboards that improve visibility, reliability, and performance.
